description: Returns count of occupied role selection slots for given side. Players who claimed a slot in the lobby but did not start the mission are counted as well. If <syntaxhighlight lang="cpp" inline>disabledAI = 0;</syntaxhighlight> in [[Description.ext#disabledAI|description.ext]] or ''Enable AI'' option is checked in [[:Category:Eden Editor|Eden Editor]], AI bots will be treated as valid players and will be counted too.
examples:
<sqf>
_west = playersNumber west;
_east = playersNumber east;
_civ = playersNumber civilian;
hint format ["West:%1 East:%2, Civ:%3", _west, _east, _civ];
</sqf>
name: playersNumber
